0.title: Welcome to Wishly!
0.description: Let us show you around so you can make the most of your wishlists. This will only take a moment.

1.title: Create your wishlists
1.description: Tap "+ New list" to create a list for any occasion: birthday, wedding, Christmas... Add a title, an occasion, and an optional date.

2.title: Add items to your list
2.description: Inside each wishlist, add items you want. Paste a product URL and the name, image, and price are auto-filled!

3.title: Share with friends
3.description: Each wishlist has a unique shareable link. Send it via WhatsApp, Telegram, email, or just copy the link. Your friends don't need an account to view it!

4.title: Track contributions
4.description: Go to "Contributions" in the bottom menu to see all the gifts you've helped fund. Contributions are always anonymous to the wishlist creator!

5.title: You're all set!
5.description: You now know the basics. Start by creating your first wishlist and sharing it with the people you love. Happy gifting!
